items.title: Logits to multi-class probabilities
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  input["feature vector x"] --> linear["linear layer: z = Wx + b"]
  linear --> logits["logits z in R^K"]
  logits --> sm["softmax: pi_k = exp(z_k) / sum exp(z_j)"]
  sm --> probs["pi: K probabilities summing to 1"]
  probs --> pred["argmax pi -> predicted class"]
items.caption: Standard multi-class head: linear layer produces logits; softmax converts them to a Categorical distribution.

items.title: Log-sum-exp stabilization
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  z["logits z"] --> maxStep["m = max(z)"]
  maxStep --> shift["z_shift = z - m"]
  shift --> expStep["exp(z_shift) all <= 1"]
  expStep --> sumStep["sum + log -> log_sum_exp"]
  sumStep --> logPi["log pi_k = z_k - log_sum_exp"]
items.caption: Subtracting max(z) before exponentiation prevents overflow while preserving exact softmax values.

items.title: Softmax paired with cross-entropy training
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  logits["logits z"] --> lsm["log_softmax"]
  label["true class y"] --> nll["-log pi_y"]
  lsm --> nll
  nll --> grad["backprop to W, b"]
items.caption: Training uses log-softmax plus negative log-likelihood on the true class; see Cross-entropy for the H(P, Q) view.
